name: Pizza with Rice Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed the green or red pepper and cut into strips.
2. In a large frypan, heat oil over medium-high heat and stir-fry onion, garlic, mushrooms, and peppers until crisp-tender, about 3 - 4 minutes. Set aside.
3. In a bowl, combine rice, egg, and 1/2 cup grated cheese. Press evenly into an oiled 12-inch pizza pan.
4. Bake in an oven preheated to 400 degrees for about 10-12 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
5. Sprinkle the cooked crust with half the remaining cheese.
6. Stir together tomato sauce, basil, oregano, pepper, and Tabasco.
7. Spread tomato sauce over the crust, then top with vegetables.
8. Sprinkle with remaining mozzarella cheese.
9. Bake for about 12-14 minutes or until cheese is bubbly. Let rest for 5 minutes before cutting. Serves 4.
